scripts.reset: docker compose stop modular-postgres-dev && docker compose rm -f modular-postgres-dev && docker volume rm modular_pg_data_dev && docker compose up -d --build modular-postgres-dev
scripts.test:reset: docker compose stop modular-postgres-test && docker compose rm -f modular-postgres-test && docker volume rm modular_pg_data_test && docker compose up -d --build modular-postgres-test
